title: Slate Upfit Planner Configuration
description: Versioned normalized configuration payload exchanged between the planner, WordPress REST, and the host adapter. This is the single source of truth for save and quote handoff.

schema_version.description: Schema contract version. Bump on breaking changes.

configuration_id.description: Host/local identifier once saved; null while unsaved.

placements.description: Placed components with their positions on a wall/zone.

infrastructure.description: Electrical, power, and structural infrastructure items.

validation.description: Fitment issues surfaced by the engine (errors/warnings/info).

totals.description: Roll-up totals (wall usage, payload, package value).
